texto: Life is an endless circle within God. From before birth to beyond the transition called death, I am filled with life. My soul wears this earth garment I call my body, which I cherish and care for. When I finally lay it down, my soul continues to live, always in God’s care and keeping.
explicacao: Citação de Daily Word sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life is an endless circle within God.
